regions.label: Controller housing with joysticks and steering wheel

connectors.label: Blue power cable connector
connectors.missing_evidence: Internal PCB connection point not visible

salvage_candidates.label: Motor driver IC and associated circuitry
salvage_candidates.missing_evidence: Under plastic casing; no visible markings or pins. Requires disassembly to confirm location and part number.
salvage_candidates.warnings: No visible voltage or current ratings; assume low-power DC motor control. Required tests: continuity between motor terminals and driver outputs, supply voltage at driver VCC, logic input response to joystick signals.
